name: Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month tool
description: For Etsy sellers processing 10–20 invoices/month, manual reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate accounts payable reconciliation instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
problem_solved: Difficulty in reconciling invoices with purchase orders
